title: cestichis reflexa
intro: Cestichis reflexa, also known as the reflexed cestichis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Cestichis reflexa include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide relief from various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Cestichis reflexa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and promoting wound healing.
